tools.name: projects.discoveryengineProjectsLocationsDataStoresBranchesDocumentsImport
tools.description: Bulk import of multiple Documents. Request processing may be synchronous. Non-existing items will be created. Note: It is possible for a subset of the Documents to be successfully updated.

tools.name: projects.discoveryengineProjectsLocationsDataStoresServingConfigsRecommend
tools.description: Makes a recommendation, which requires a contextual user event.

tools.name: projects.discoveryengineProjectsLocationsDataStoresUserEventsCollect
tools.description: Writes a single user event from the browser. This uses a GET request to due to browser restriction of POST-ing to a 3rd party domain. This method is used only by the Discovery Engine API JavaScript pixel and Google Tag Manager. Users should not call this method directly.

tools.name: projects.discoveryengineProjectsLocationsDataStoresUserEventsImport
tools.description: Bulk import of User events. Request processing might be synchronous. Events that already exist are skipped. Use this method for backfilling historical user events. Operation.response is of type ImportResponse. Note that it is possible for a subset of the items to be successfully inserted. Operation.metadata is of type ImportMetadata.

tools.name: projects.discoveryengineProjectsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: projects.discoveryengineProjectsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
